def positive_import_time_file_io():
    rule_id = "import_time_file_io"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Module-scope file reads, writes, or directory scans that happen during import."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
